privileged_info_summary: Task 'rotate_90_cw@1' tests 90° clockwise rotation in GIMP. The landscape reference image (800x600) is sourced from an accessible Unsplash URL. The verifier correctly uses PIL's rotate(-90) to generate the 90° clockwise reference, which properly swaps dimensions to 600x800. Verification uses SSIM with a 0.95 threshold (verified to pass legitimate rotations with compression artifacts) and requires 3 of 4 criteria to succeed. All core rotation and dimension logic is mathematically correct.
